mapper.select:
SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode,
i.status_code AS statusCode, s.code_id AS statusId, cs.code_name AS statusName,
i.title AS title, i.priority AS priority, cp.code_name AS priorityName,
i.assignee_code AS assigneeCode, au.name AS assigneeName,
i.created_by_code AS createdByCode, cu.name AS creatorName,
i.created_at AS createdAt, i.due_at AS dueAt, i.position AS position,
CASE WHEN i.due_at IS NOT NULL AND i.due_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 ELSE i.progress END AS progress,
p.project_name AS projectName,
i.type_code AS typeCode, t.type_name AS typeName
FROM issues i JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code AND s.project_code = i.project_code LEFT JOIN users au ON au.user_code = i.assignee_code LEFT JOIN users cu ON cu.user_code = i.created_by_code LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = i.project_code LEFT JOIN common_code cs on cs.code_id = s.code_id LEFT JOIN common_code cp on cp.code_id = i.priority LEFT JOIN types t on t.type_code = i.type_code WHERE 1=1
AND i.project_code = #{projectCode}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{userCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND v.status = 'OD1' )
AND i.assignee_code = #{userCode}
AND (i.assignee_code = #{userCode} OR i.created_by_code = #{userCode})
AND ( i.assignee_code = #{userCode} OR i.created_by_code = #{userCode} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v2 WHERE v2.user_code = #{userCode} AND v2.project_code = i.project_code AND v2.admin_ck = 'Y' AND v2.status = 'OD1' ) )
ORDER BY s.code_id, COALESCE(i.position, 999999), i.issue_code DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE issues i SET i.status_code = ( SELECT s.status_code FROM status s WHERE s.project_code = #{projectCode} AND s.code_id = #{toStatusCode} ), i.position = #{position},
i.started_at = CASE WHEN i.started_at IS NULL AND #{toStatusCode} != 'OB1' AND (SELECT s0.code_id FROM status s0 WHERE s0.status_code = i.status_code AND s0.project_code = i.project_code) = 'OB1' THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE i.started_at END,
i.progress = CASE WHEN i.due_at IS NOT NULL AND i.due_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 WHEN #{toStatusCode} = 'OB1' THEN 0 WHEN #{toStatusCode} = 'OB3' THEN 95 WHEN #{toStatusCode} = 'OB4' THEN 50 WHEN #{toStatusCode} = 'OB5' THEN 100 ELSE i.progress END,
i.resolved_at = CASE WHEN #{toStatusCode} = 'OB5' AND i.resolved_at IS NULL THEN SYSTIMESTAMP ELSE i.resolved_at END,
i.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE i.issue_code = #{issueCode}

UPDATE issues i SET i.progress = CASE WHEN i.due_at IS NOT NULL AND i.due_at < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 100 ELSE #{progress} END, i.updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE i.issue_code = #{issueCode} AND i.project_code = #{projectCode}
mapper.select: SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, i.assignee_code AS assigneeCode, s.code_id AS statusId FROM issues i JOIN status s ON s.status_code = i.status_code AND s.project_code = i.project_code WHERE i.project_code = #{projectCode} AND i.issue_code = #{issueCode} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vw_user_auth v WHERE v.user_code = #{userCode} AND v.project_code = i.project_code AND v.status = 'OD1' )
